languages.text: {n}Ваши старания оставить как можно меньше повреждений на имперской реликвии окупаются — не то чтобы вы вовсе не оставили следов, но, кажется, хотя бы не повредили саму бумагу.{/n}

{n}Your efforts to inflict as little damage as possible on the Imperial relic are paying off — not that you have left no marks at all, but, at the very least, you do not seem to have damaged the paper itself.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ваши старания оставить как можно меньше повреждений на имперской реликвии окупаются — не то чтобы вы вовсе не оставили следов, но, кажется, хотя бы не повредили саму бумагу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Your efforts to inflict as little damage as possible on the Imperial relic are paying off — not that you have left no marks at all, but, at the very least, you do not seem to have damaged the paper itself.{/n}

{n}Your efforts to inflict as little damage as possible on the Imperial relic are paying off — not that you have left no marks at all, but, at the very least, you do not seem to have damaged the paper itself.{/n}

{n}Your efforts to inflict as little damage as possible on the Imperial relic are paying off — not that you have left no marks at all, but, at the very least, you do not seem to have damaged the paper itself.{/n}

languages.text: {n}御遺物に与えるダメージを最小限にする努力が実を結んでいる。少なくとも、紙そのものに損傷を与えたわけではない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your efforts to inflict as little damage as possible on the Imperial relic are paying off — not that you have left no marks at all, but, at the very least, you do not seem to have damaged the paper itself.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 御遺物に与えるダメージを最小限にする努力が実を結んでいる。少なくとも、紙そのものに損傷を与えたわけではない。

languages.text: {n}Tus esfuerzos por no dañar la reliquia imperial están dando frutos. No es que no estés dejando huella, pero por lo menos parece que no has dañado el propio papel.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your efforts to inflict as little damage as possible on the Imperial relic are paying off — not that you have left no marks at all, but, at the very least, you do not seem to have damaged the paper itself.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tus esfuerzos por no dañar la reliquia imperial están dando frutos. No es que no estés dejando huella, pero por lo menos parece que no has dañado el propio papel.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Deine Bemühungen, dem imperialen Relikt möglichst geringen Schaden zuzufügen, zahlen sich aus ... du hast zwar Spuren darauf hinterlassen, aber immerhin scheinst du das Papier selbst nicht beschädigt zu haben.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your efforts to inflict as little damage as possible on the Imperial relic are paying off — not that you have left no marks at all, but, at the very least, you do not seem to have damaged the paper itself.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Deine Bemühungen, dem imperialen Relikt möglichst geringen Schaden zuzufügen, zahlen sich aus ... du hast zwar Spuren darauf hinterlassen, aber immerhin scheinst du das Papier selbst nicht beschädigt zu haben.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vos efforts pour ne pas endommager davantage la relique impériale semblent payer : certes, votre passage a laissé quelques traces, mais vous n'avez pas abîmé le papier.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your efforts to inflict as little damage as possible on the Imperial relic are paying off — not that you have left no marks at all, but, at the very least, you do not seem to have damaged the paper itself.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vos efforts pour ne pas endommager davantage la relique impériale semblent payer : certes, votre passage a laissé quelques traces, mais vous n'avez pas abîmé le papier.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你力求尽可能减少对帝国圣物的损害，这番努力奏效了——虽然并非完全不留痕迹，但至少，你似乎没有损坏纸张本身。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your efforts to inflict as little damage as possible on the Imperial relic are paying off — not that you have left no marks at all, but, at the very least, you do not seem to have damaged the paper itself.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你力求尽可能减少对帝国圣物的损害，这番努力奏效了——虽然并非完全不留痕迹，但至少，你似乎没有损坏纸张本身。{/n}

languages.text: {n}İmparatorluk yadigârına mümkün olduğunca az zarar verme çaban meyvesini veriyor. Hiç iz bırakmamış değilsin ancak en azından kâğıdın kendisine zarar vermemişsin gibi görünüyor.{/n}
